title: x402-ci-report
description: Fixed schema for the JSON report produced by base-x402-ci at $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/x402-ci-report.json.

run_id.description: UUID or run-<pid>-<epoch> if uuidgen is unavailable.

facilitator.description: Deployed facilitator address (0x...) or HTTP endpoint URL.

rpc_host.description: Host-only redaction of the RPC endpoint URL. The full URL (which may carry an API key) is intentionally omitted.

harness_exit_code.description: Exit code of the ci/live_<chain>.sh invocation. 0 = success; non-zero = harness or preflight failure.

planted_fired.description: Planted-leg variants that surfaced INVARIANT VIOLATED.

clean_failed.description: Clean-leg variants that failed (a bug in the harness or the facilitator's clean path).

planted_missed.description: Planted-leg variants that did not fire (a coverage bug in the harness OR the facilitator has a distinct spec that makes the planted twin inapplicable).
